characters.description: An outsider consciousness awakens in the dying body of Jin Jue, a former outer disciple of the Cloudy Sword Sect. Calling himself Jin, he abandons revenge and sect ambition to establish a farm near Verdant Hill.
characters.name: Jin

characters.description: A senior disciple of the Cloudy Sword Sect who handles Jin Jue's departure. He recognizes the departing disciple's diligence by returning the fee charged for leaving.
characters.name: Lu Jue

characters.description: Jin's young rooster and steady companion during the earliest work of establishing the farm. Jin feeds him and the other chickens spirit herbs.
characters.name: Big D

characters.description: The awakened rooster previously known as Big D. He regards Jin as his master, imitates Jin's training, and assumes personal responsibility for defending Fa Ram.
characters.name: Bi De

characters.description: An unusually persistent fox that preys upon the chickens at Fa Ram and repeatedly tests the farm's defenses.
characters.name: Basi Bu Shi

characters.description: Hong Yaowu's healer and the village chief's daughter. She can sense chi by scent, distrusts cultivators who abuse ordinary people, and witnesses Jin dispatch the feared Reaper Wolf.
characters.name: Meiling

characters.description: Meiling's close friend, preparing for her marriage to Ting Feng. Jin gives her a fox pelt as a wedding gift when he visits Hong Yaowu.
characters.name: Meihua

characters.description: Meihua's intended husband, whom she is soon to marry.
characters.name: Ting Feng

characters.description: An ancient predator feared near Hong Yaowu and reputed to be capable of killing cultivators.
characters.name: Reaper Wolf

characters.description: Meiling's father and the chief of Hong Yaowu. He travels with the village caravan and holds responsibility for his family and community.
characters.name: Hong Xian

characters.description: One of the Song brothers, a caravan companion and a close friend of Meiling's family.
characters.name: Yun Ren

characters.description: One of the Song brothers, a caravan companion and a close friend of Meiling's family.
characters.name: Gou Ren

characters.description: A man claiming to be a young master of the Shrouded Mountain Sect. He demands Meihua, attacks when opposed, and is taken to the Verdant Hill jail after Jin defeats him and his companions.
characters.name: Zhang Li

characters.description: A young boar given to Jin by Ting Feng alongside Pi Pa as thanks for protecting Meihua.
characters.name: Chun Ke

characters.description: A young sow given to Jin by Ting Feng alongside Chun Ke as thanks for protecting Meihua.
characters.name: Pi Pa

characters.description: A Shrouded Mountain Sect elder and uncle of the real Zhang Li. He comes to Verdant Hill to retrieve the jailed claimant and exposes that the man's identity is false.
characters.name: Tianli Wei

characters.description: The infiltrator who appeared earlier as Zhang Li. He murdered the real young master and maintains the stolen identity through a consuming disguise technique.
characters.name: Luban

characters.description: Leader and spokesman of a starving Blackfur group that enters Fa Ram. Presenting his clan as refugees, he is admitted as Bi De's guest and placed under the rooster's protection.
characters.name: Chow Ji

characters.description: An orange kitten given to Jin in Verdant Hill after he helps return a misplaced goat. She is not yet named when she first joins him.
characters.name: orange kitten

characters.description: The name Jin gives to the orange kitten he recently received in Verdant Hill.
characters.name: Tigu

characters.description: A small female Blackfur saved by Bi De. She serves him at Fa Ram but is disturbed by Chow Ji's treatment of her clan.
characters.name: small female Blackfur

characters.description: A small rat disciple at Fa Ram who helps break down the physical impurities left in Bi De by Chow Ji's corruption.
characters.name: Ri Zu

characters.description: The dormant spirit within the land of Fa Ram. It accepts chi offered by Bi De before settling into its winter sleep.
characters.name: Fa Ram land spirit

characters.description: Meihua's husband and Jin's discreet contact in Verdant Hill. He protects Jin's identity and generosity from unwanted public attention.
characters.name: Zhuge Tingfang

characters.description: An adviser to Verdant Hill's Lord Magistrate. He recommends handling Jin discreetly and helping locate a recording crystal for him.
characters.name: First Archivist Bao

characters.description: Verdant Hill's chief official. Concerned by Jin's strength and the town's rice transaction with him, he favors a discreet and respectful relationship.
characters.name: Lord Magistrate

characters.description: An Initiate who leads the fleeing Whirling Demon Sword gang. After discovering Fa Ram nearby, he selects the household as the gang's next target.
characters.name: Sun Ken

characters.description: A Verdant Blade Sect cultivator pursuing Sun Ken after a campaign against his gang. Critically wounded and contaminated while following the trail, she reaches Fa Ram in need of immediate aid.
characters.name: Cai Xiulan

characters.description: A sentient carp who reveals himself while seeking food, stealing bait and snapping fishing lines during an outing at Fa Ram.
characters.name: Wa Shi

characters.description: A hostile cultivator at Shrouded Mountain whose punishment still confines him within fifty li. Despite the restriction, he has advanced and intends eventually to find and kill Jin.
characters.name: Confined Shrouded Mountain disciple

characters.description: A lost creature from the northern wastes reported near Hong Yaowu. The Song brothers' mother identifies its kind and orders that it not be hunted.
characters.name: thunder hoof
